# Hosts-style blocklist
# Common hosts file format
0.0.0.0 adserver.example.com
0.0.0.0 banner.example.com
127.0.0.1 tracking.example.com
0.0.0.0 analytics.example.com
::1 telemetry.example.com
0.0.0.0 pixel.example.com
# Localhost entries (should be skipped)
127.0.0.1 localhost
127.0.0.1 localhost.localdomain
::1 ip6-localhost
